body:
APPROVE
Implementation cleanly wires ContextWindows and SupportsTools from the catalog into ProviderEntry, plus recomputes the agent harness's SupportsTools so the engine's OR-semantics let a per-model no_tools flag actually fire. Tests use a real fixture catalog and exercise the three structural boundaries called out in the routing-test-rigor memory (gate fires, gate fires for different reason, gate is no-op when inputs zero). The ne…

error: failed to push some refs to 'https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent.git': exit status 1
Implementation cleanly wires ContextWindows and SupportsTools from the catalog into ProviderEntry, plus recomputes the agent harness's SupportsTools so the engine's OR-semantics let a per-model no_tools flag actually fire. Tests use a real fixture catalog and exercise the three structural boundaries called out in the routing-test-rigor memory (gate fires, gate fires for different reason, gate is no-op when inputs zero). The new SupportsToolsForModel helper sensibly defaults to "capable" for unknown models.
